001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.text.Editable;
004import android.text.TextWatcher;
005import android.view.LayoutInflater;
006import android.view.ViewGroup;
007import android.widget.EditText;
008import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
009import androidx.recyclerview.widget.DiffUtil;
010import androidx.recyclerview.widget.ListAdapter;
011import androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView;
012import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.R;
013import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.databinding.ItemBulkCandlingGroupBinding;
014import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
015import java.util.HashMap;
016import java.util.Map;
017import java.util.Objects;
018
019/**
020 * Adapter used to display egg groups and collect bulk candling input values.
021 *
022 * <p>Each row shows an egg group and lets the user enter the number of viable
023 * eggs observed for that group.
024 */
025public class BulkCandlingGroupAdapter
026    extends ListAdapter<EggGroup, BulkCandlingGroupAdapter.ViewHolder> {
027
028  /**
029   * Listener notified when an input field should receive focus and show the keyboard.
030   */
031  public interface OnInputFocusListener {
032
033    /**
034     * Requests focus handling for the provided input field.
035     *
036     * @param editText input field that should receive focus.
037     */
038    void onInputFocused(@NonNull EditText editText);
039  }
040
041  private final Map<Long, String> enteredValues = new HashMap<>();
042  private final OnInputFocusListener focusListener;
043
044  /**
045   * Creates a new adapter instance.
046   *
047   * @param focusListener listener used when an input field gains focus.
048   */
049  public BulkCandlingGroupAdapter(@NonNull OnInputFocusListener focusListener) {
050    super(DIFF_CALLBACK);
051    this.focusListener = focusListener;
052  }
053
054  /**
055   * Creates a new view holder for an egg-group row.
056   *
057   * @param parent parent view group.
058   * @param viewType view type identifier.
059   * @return new view holder instance.
060   */
061  @NonNull
062  @Override
063  public ViewHolder onCreateViewHolder(@NonNull ViewGroup parent, int viewType) {
064    ItemBulkCandlingGroupBinding binding = ItemBulkCandlingGroupBinding.inflate(
065        LayoutInflater.from(parent.getContext()), parent, false);
066    return new ViewHolder(binding);
067  }
068
069  /**
070   * Binds an egg-group item to the specified view holder.
071   *
072   * @param holder target view holder.
073   * @param position adapter position.
074   */
075  @Override
076  public void onBindViewHolder(@NonNull ViewHolder holder, int position) {
077    holder.bind(getItem(position));
078  }
079
080  /**
081   * Returns whether the user has entered at least one non-blank viable-count value.
082   *
083   * @return {@code true} if any value has been entered; otherwise {@code false}.
084   */
085  public boolean hasAnyEnteredValue() {
086    for (EggGroup group : getCurrentList()) {
087      String raw = enteredValues.get(group.getId());
088      if (raw != null && !raw.isBlank()) {
089        return true;
090      }
091    }
092    return false;
093  }
094
095  /**
096   * Collects valid entered values as viable counts keyed by egg-group ID.
097   *
098   * <p>Values are clamped to the range from 0 to the group's initial egg count.
099   *
100   * @return map of egg-group IDs to validated viable counts.
101   */
102  @NonNull
103  public Map<Long, Integer> collectValidCounts() {
104    Map<Long, Integer> counts = new HashMap<>();
105    for (EggGroup group : getCurrentList()) {
106      String raw = enteredValues.get(group.getId());
107      if (raw == null || raw.isBlank()) {
108        continue;
109      }
110
111      int value = Integer.parseInt(raw);
112      int clamped = Math.max(0, Math.min(value, group.getInitialEggCount()));
113      counts.put(group.getId(), clamped);
114    }
115    return counts;
116  }
117
118  /**
119   * Validates all entered viable-count values.
120   *
121   * @return {@code true} if all entered values are numeric and within range;
122   *     otherwise {@code false}.
123   */
124  public boolean validateInputs() {
125    boolean valid = true;
126    for (int i = 0; i < getCurrentList().size(); i++) {
127      EggGroup group = getCurrentList().get(i);
128      String raw = enteredValues.get(group.getId());
129      if (raw == null || raw.isBlank()) {
130        continue;
131      }
132      try {
133        int value = Integer.parseInt(raw);
134        if (value < 0 || value > group.getInitialEggCount()) {
135          valid = false;
136        }
137      } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
138        valid = false;
139      }
140    }
141    return valid;
142  }
143
144  class ViewHolder extends RecyclerView.ViewHolder {
145
146    private final ItemBulkCandlingGroupBinding binding;
147    private TextWatcher watcher;
148
149    ViewHolder(@NonNull ItemBulkCandlingGroupBinding binding) {
150      super(binding.getRoot());
151      this.binding = binding;
152    }
153
154    void bind(@NonNull EggGroup group) {
155      binding.breedName.setText(group.getBreed());
156      binding.groupEggCount.setText(
157          itemView.getContext().getString(
158              R.string.label_group_egg_count, group.getInitialEggCount())
159      );
160
161      if (watcher != null) {
162        binding.viableCountInput.removeTextChangedListener(watcher);
163      }
164
165      String currentValue = enteredValues.get(group.getId());
166      binding.viableCountInput.setText(currentValue != null ? currentValue : "");
167      binding.viableCountInput.setHint(String.valueOf(group.getInitialEggCount()));
168      binding.viableCountInput.setError(null);
169
170      watcher = new TextWatcher() {
171        @Override
172        public void beforeTextChanged(CharSequence s, int start, int count, int after) {
173        }
174
175        @Override
176        public void onTextChanged(CharSequence s, int start, int before, int count) {
177        }
178
179        @Override
180        public void afterTextChanged(Editable s) {
181          enteredValues.put(group.getId(), s.toString().trim());
182        }
183      };
184      binding.viableCountInput.addTextChangedListener(watcher);
185
186      binding.viableCountInput.setOnClickListener(
187          v -> focusListener.onInputFocused(binding.viableCountInput));
188
189      binding.viableCountInput.setOnFocusChangeListener((v, hasFocus) -> {
190        if (hasFocus) {
191          focusListener.onInputFocused(binding.viableCountInput);
192        }
193      });
194    }
195  }
196
197  private static final DiffUtil.ItemCallback<EggGroup> DIFF_CALLBACK =
198      new DiffUtil.ItemCallback<>() {
199        @Override
200        public boolean areItemsTheSame(@NonNull EggGroup oldItem, @NonNull EggGroup newItem) {
201          return oldItem.getId() == newItem.getId();
202        }
203
204        @Override
205        public boolean areContentsTheSame(@NonNull EggGroup oldItem, @NonNull EggGroup newItem) {
206          return oldItem.getBatchId() == newItem.getBatchId()
207              && Objects.equals(oldItem.getBreed(), newItem.getBreed())
208              && oldItem.getInitialEggCount() == newItem.getInitialEggCount()
209              && Objects.equals(oldItem.getNotes(), newItem.getNotes());
210        }
211      };
212}
